content.en:
Before trying to create space-time control techniques, Ye Tian first went to create several space-time control techniques that were mainly based on destructive power as a practice work.

If it was before, if Ye Tian wanted to create such a space-time control technique, he would need at least hundreds of eternal eras.

However, now, Ye Tian's speed of creation is too fast.

In less than an eternal era, Ye Hao successfully created a space-time supreme technique - the Hand of Annihilation!

Subsequently, Ye Tian spent a while creating another space-time supreme technique - Destroying Pupil Light!

For Ye Tian, it doesn't take much time to create a space-time supreme technique now, but at least he can accumulate experience and prepare for the creation of space-time control techniques.

In the back, Ye Tian's creation of space-time supreme techniques was a bit arbitrary, mainly studying the power of destruction.

this day.

Ye Tian began to formally study the creation of space-time control techniques, and its difficulty suddenly increased by more than a hundred times.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to try to create, and often went to the Dao Domain Tower to fight, and often fought with the big tree in the Rising Realm, sharpening his research gains.

Gradually, Ye Tian had some understanding, but he was still far from creating a space-time control technique.

Before you know it, thousands of eternal years have passed.

"You can't create it. "

Ye Tian shook his head.

It's not that he doesn't want to create, but after such a long period of research, he found that without fusing time and space to the pinnacle of the realm, there is no way to create a space-time control technique with the power of space-time control.

Of course, he is not without gains, otherwise 017 would not have studied and created for so long.

He is researching a space-time supreme technique, but he can exert some of the power of the space-time control technique, and this space-time supreme technique has surpassed the top space-time supreme technique, which can be called a half-step space-time mastery technique.

Once he created such a space-time supreme skill, he would have a chance to break through the third level of the Daoyu Tower.

Moreover, the Dao he now controls has surpassed the number of two hundred, and is approaching the number of three hundred step by step.

If the Dao under his control exceeds three hundred, and he has passed the third level of the Dao Domain Tower, he can join the Hall of Eternity.

"I've almost researched it, and in a few hundred more eternal epochs, I can probably completely create a half-step space-time mastery technique. Ye Tian said darkly.

In the blink of an eye, more than six hundred eternal epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created this half-step space-time control technique.

This half-step space-time control technique is still based on the power of destruction, time and space, and is assisted by many paths.

He named this half-step space-time control technique the light of piercing, which was to condense a spear of light with the ultimate destructive power plus the power of time and space, and instantly pierce all matter.

After creating this half-step space-time control technique, Ye Tian came to the Dao Domain Tower, and he wanted to break through the third level.

The third level of the Daoyu Tower.

Ye Tian came here, and soon the opponent of the third level appeared.

The opponent's will in the third level is also a half-step eighth-order, and his willpower is not as strong as Ye Tian's, after all, he has refined a large number of seven-colored golden fruits, and his willpower is very close to the eighth-order.

The strength of the will is strong, which also gives him some advantages.

The battle is on!

Tian didn't want to delay the battle, his flaws were obvious, that is, his defense was insufficient, and his speed was insufficient, so he could only rely on the half-step space-time control technique of the Piercing Piercing.

Therefore, he had to be quick to solve the problem.

"Piercing Light!"

A piercing light instantly struck and locked onto the other party.

This blow cannot be avoided by the opponent, unless the opponent's willpower reaches the eighth order.

Poof!!

The piercing light pierced through the opponent's body, annihilating most of the opponent's body.

However, even so, the other party did not fall.

Walk in the Void!

Ye Tian used this space-time supreme technique in time, but the opponent's attack also came, directly injuring Ye Tian.

Fortunately, Ye Tian's willpower has improved a lot now, and he can react in time, otherwise this time it will be a heavy blow.

Ye Tian went all out, constantly fighting with the other party, and soon cast another piercing light, hitting the other party again.

However, Ye Tian himself was also seriously injured.

Finally, Ye Tian cast the third piercing light and killed the other party, but he was also shattered by the opponent's dying blow, and almost fell.

I have to say that the piercing light is powerful enough to make Ye Tian fight beyond the level.

Of course, he can also be regarded as the peak Legendary Realm Lord combat power of the fourth level.

"Finally passed, and then you only need to raise the number of Dao under control to three hundred, and you can completely join the Eternal Temple. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

So, he began to comprehend these ways with all his might.

With the improvement of willpower and the creation of a half-step space-time control technique, Ye Tian's own realm has improved, and the Dao is connected with each other, so the difficulty of Ye Tian to comprehend other Dao has naturally been reduced.

So, in the back, the time it takes him to control a path is getting shorter and shorter.

This time, Ye Tian was ready to completely control the three hundred paths, so he had been cultivating penance.

Of course, the replica body of the Cloud Forest Sea was also constantly using the cloud marrow liquid of the Cloud Forest Sea to refine the Supreme Body of Time and Space and comprehend the Cloud Pattern Tablet, but the effect was becoming more and more general, and it was almost useless.

The Void Zone has been very quiet for a while, and there are no major events.

It is worth mentioning that the True Absence Holy Land has given birth to several more Legendary Realm Lords, but no new Peak Legendary Realm Lords have been born.

If you want to give birth to another peak Legendary Realm Lord, it is still very difficult.

The years have passed.

In the blink of an eye, 10,000 eternal epochs have passed.

For such a long time, Ye Tian's space-time fusion was already close to its peak, but in fact, it was still very difficult to cross this step.

However, the number of Daos controlled by Ye Tian finally reached three hundred.

With three hundred Dao under control, plus passing the third level of the Dao Domain Tower, Ye Tian had already obtained the qualification to join the Hall of Eternity.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Dao Domain Tower and applied to join the Eternal Hall through the Dao Domain Tower.

At this time, he only needs to wait for the invitation of the Temple of Eternity.

A region of nothingness, an unknown time and space.

A temple that seems to be the origin of all things stands here across time and space.

Suddenly, several Eternal Masters appeared.

Of course, this is only their incarnation descending here, not the ontology.

The Eternal Masters do not have clones, nor can they condense clones, which is also one of the flaws of the Eternal Masters, but their avatars can have hundreds of millions, and each avatar is comparable to the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fifth level.

Soon, several of the Eternal Masters began to discuss.

"There is a message on the side of the Dao Domain Tower, and there is a peak Legendary Realm Lord in the Void Region who has passed the third level, and has mastered three hundred Dao, meeting the qualifications to join the Eternal Temple. "

"Who is it, Lei Yan, Yonghe, Jieli?"

"No, it's a newly promoted peak Legendary Realm Lord, called the Endless Lord, named Ye Tian, very young. "

"Endless Lord Ye Tian, I really haven't paid much attention to it, I'll take a look. "

However, when these Eternal Masters looked at Ye Tian through time and space, they found that Ye Tian's future was blurred.

Suddenly, they were shocked.

They are the eternal masters, even they can't see through Ye Tian's future, how can this be?

"There are two possibilities, one is that Ye Tian is not a creature in our Void Region, so we can't watch his future, but he is obviously a creature in the Void Region, and this possibility can be erased. The second is that he will inevitably become an eternal controller in the future, even a very powerful eternal controller, and Ye Tian in the future has directly blocked the timeline of his past body, so that I can't even view it. "

"No, there is another possibility, that is, he has some treasure that can shield perception, but it is unlikely. "

"Yes, judging from his talent and growth rate, the second possibility is the most likely, that is, he will definitely become the eternal master in the future. Of course, even if the future is bound to become the eternal master, if he falls halfway, then the timeline he is in will inevitably collapse completely, and there will be no future timeline for him. "

"Hahaha, such a genius, it's too late for us to bless him, so naturally we won't allow him to fall. "

"Endless Lord Ye Tian is qualified to join the Hall of Eternity, who will lead him?"

"Let White Whisker go, we are the Eternal Masters, there is no need to put down our subordinates to take a peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"Okay, then let Whitebeard go. "

After the Eternal Masters finished speaking, they informed the white-bearded old man who was in the void area. _
